Vice of Fury.name: 暴怒败德 Vice of Fury
Vice of Fury.description: Anger is a common emotion on the battlefield. It's perfectly natural to feel fury when enemies kill a friend or when a traitor betrays you and your companions. Frustration is bound to arise when a foe slips away or an objective remains out of reach. Such rage is hardly a vice. Fury's dark side arises when it occludes thought, when it rules action, and when it harms without thought for the consequences. Blackguards who indulge in their fury run the risk of losing control and striking out at anyone in their path. Guilt and innocence become meaningless concepts to a warrior in fury's throes. Such paladins can work terrible acts when consumed by their passions. When fury is your vice, you might be temperamental and violent. You could erupt at the slightest provocation, resorting to hostility to solve your problems. Or you might make every effort to maintain control when you need to, letting the hound of fury loose only when it is needed. Even then, if pushed too far, you risk exploding. If you aim to keep your fury under control, your biggest fear is hurting someone or something you value. 阵营：只要不是守序善良。大多数暴怒黑暗卫士是无阵营的。愤怒将模糊哲学立场并掩盖和平的解决方式 1级：败德精神（暴怒） Spirit of Vice (Fury) Your anger increases your strength in battle, giving you a decided edge when striking at your foes. To access this greater strength, you must give into the burgeoning hate. 增益：当你对一个敌人有战斗优势时，你在伤害骰上获得+2加值。此加值在你重伤或邻近一个重伤生物时为+4 1级：败德随意威能（暴怒） Vice At-Will Power (Fury) The violence of combat fuels your fury. Your enemies pale before your battle-crazed visage. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.CMSshBlwGDqZiEF7]{凶蛮打击 Ferocious Strike}威能 7级：进阶暗影护罩（暴怒） Improved Shroud of Shadow (Fury) When you draw directly on shadow magic, your fury infuses your attacks. 增益：当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.znIjB6X0c9DHvqJt]{暗影护罩 Shroud of Shadow}时，在你下一回合结束前，你在下一个伤害骰上获得等同于2 + 你魅力调整值的加值。23级时，此加值等同于5 + 你魅力调整值 11级：残酷黑暗卫士行动（暴怒） Grim Blackguard's Action (Fury) 残酷黑暗卫士典范之道特性 Your brutal advance menaces your enemies, filling them with dread. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你对所有敌人获得战斗优势，直到你下一回合结束 11级：败德遭遇威能（暴怒） Vice Encounter Power (Fury) 残酷黑暗卫士典范之道特性 Violence begets violence. In the right circumstances, it takes little to provoke you. When stirred to respond, you speed to the offending enemy and deliver a punishing strike with little regard for the consequences. {{暴怒之奴 Slave to Fury}} 12级：败德辅助威能（暴怒） Vice Utility Power (Fury) 残酷黑暗卫士典范之道特性 You can raise an icon of your vice for all to see, driving you and your allies to strike enemies with unbounded rage. Enemies understand that to be near this altar is to be the focus of unrelenting ire. {{暴怒祭坛 Altar of Fury}} 20级：败德每日威能（暴怒） Vice Daily Power (Fury) 残酷黑暗卫士典范之道特性 You use your familiarity with your vice to turn an enemy's rage against it. Your strike leaves behind a psychic seed of unreasoning fury that tears at the mind and forces your foe into unreasonable acts of anger. {{失控暴怒 Uncontrolled Fury}} 22级：败德辅助威能（暴怒） Vice Utility Power (Fury) You warp your allies with uncontrollable bloodlust, erasing their self-control and making them ruthless warriors for as long as they remain under your influence. {{狂暴杀戮 Rampaging Bloodlust}}

Illusion School.name: 幻术学派 Illusion School
Illusion School.description: Spells of the illusion school deceive the mind and confuse the senses. A master of illusion uses arcane magic to build on a natural talent for trickery, and knows that the timing of an illusion is often as important as its power. 1级：幻术学徒 Illusion Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 Any mage can make use of illusion magic, but your specific focus lends potency to the spells you cast. A creature caught up in your illusion remains rattled even after the magic is done, unable to focus past its terror or confusion as it makes its counterattack. 增益：当你以一个奥术幻术威能命中一个目标时，在你下一回合结束前此目标在它下一次对你的攻击骰上受到-2减值 5级：幻术专家 Illusion Expert 专家级学派法师特性 As a specialist in illusion magic, you subtly channel the power of your art to cloak your own movements and intentions. 增益：你在唬骗检定和隐秘检定上获得+2加值 10级：幻术大师 Illusion Master 大师级学派法师特性 As you near the end of the heroic tier, your illusions take on a deadly realism that rattles your foes. Even an enemy that sees through your deception is wracked by doubt and fear that ruins its defenses for a critical moment. 增益：当你的一个奥术幻术威能对一个目标命中或失手时，在你下回合结束前，目标给下一次对它进行的攻击提供战斗优势。 11级：幻术行动 Illusion Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Those who dismiss illusion magic for its ephemeral quality fail to understand the very real strength it lends you. When you push yourself past your limits, a shroud of light and shadow protects you from your enemies' attacks. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在AC和反射上获得等同于你感知调整值的威能加值，直到你下一回合结束 11级：幻术遭遇威能 Illusion Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 The legendary wizard Nolzur was obsessed with formulating illusion spells capable of creating tangible effects and objects that would persist in the real world. This spell was the first step in his research, channeling illusion magic to recreate the eff ects of other spells. {{诺尔祖之影法术 Nolzur's Shade Spell}} 12级：幻术辅助威能 Illusion Utility Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 The power of divine magic to mend wounds and banish disease fascinated Nolzur. He created this spell in an attempt to prove that his arcane illusions could mimic even the most potent effects of other magic, creating a useful alternative to the healing of other classes. {{诺尔祖之虚幻活力术 Nolzur's Phantom Vigor}} 20级：幻术每日威能 Illusion Daily Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Nolzur eventually found other challenges to distract him from his quest to duplicate magic of any sort using the power of illusion. However, this spell confirms the lasting legacy of that research, and is the most potent part of many an illusion mage's spell arsenal. {{诺尔祖之幻影法术 Nolzur's Phantom Spell}}

Enchantment School.name: 惑控学派 Enchantment School
Enchantment School.description: The enchantment school of magic centers on the study of charms and other spells that change a creature's attitudes and perceptions. Specialization in enchantment magic allows you to exercise powerful and precise control over your enemies, even to the point where they attack with a fanatic's fury at your command. 1级：惑控学徒 Enchantment Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 By focusing on the study of enchantment magic, you learn to achieve more control over your enemies. 增益：当你的一个奥术惑控威能允许你拉近、推离、滑动一个生物时，此被迫移动的最大距离增加2格 5级：惑控专家 Enchantment Expert 专家级学派法师特性 Your study of enchantment gives you the ability to inflect your words with magic, enhancing your powers of persuasion. 增益：你在唬骗检定和交涉检定上获得+2加值 10级：惑控大师 Enchantment Master 大师级学派法师特性 As you master the initial secrets of enchantment magic, you learn to invoke a deadly rage in the minds you manipulate. 增益：当你的一个奥术惑控威能迫使一个生物进行一次攻击时，此生物在此攻击骰上获得+2加值 11级：惑控行动 Enchantment Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 When you push yourself beyond your normal limits, the magic of the Feywild swirls around you. Your enemies become caught in a web of enchantment for a brief moment, causing them to stumble and move as if in a dream. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你滑动离你2格内的每个敌人最多等同于你魅力调整值的格数 11级：惑控遭遇威能 Enchantment Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 The legendary wizard Otto made a career of melding music and arcane spellcraft. This spell creates a discordant tune that echoes through a victim's mind, forcing it to do your bidding. Moreover, even after your control is broken, the victim is unable to fully react—a prime target for you and your allies. {{奥托之扭曲术 Otto's Twisting Tune}} 12级：惑控辅助威能 Enchantment Utility Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Otto was a thoroughly capricious individual, and he was not above making friends and new allies with the help of this signature spell. More than one of Otto's many apprentices recalls being suddenly inspired to undertake some mischievous (though rarely dangerous) task on the wizard's behalf. {{奥托之忠诚歌唱术 Otto's Song of Fidelity}} 20级：惑控每日威能 Enchantment Daily Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Otto found that certain strains of music consistently inspired a physical response. This spell builds on that principle, creating a wave of dominating magic that inevitably crumbles a victim's resolve. Each time a creature shrugs off your attempt to control it, your song of command becomes more insistent in response. {{奥托之绝对命令术 Otto's Inevitable Command}}

Fey Pact.name: 精类契约 Fey Pact
Fey Pact.description:
The lords of the Feywild grant power to mortals for a variety of reasons. Some do so out of a sense of twisted mirth, because they enjoy granting great power to those without the maturity or sense to use it wisely. Others court mortal champions who can protect the fey realms and hold back the rising tide of evil. 1级：精类契约奖励 Fey Pact Reward As a fey pact hexblade, you learn to channel your natural agility into your magical and physical attacks, enhancing their deadliness. 增益：你在你的邪术师攻击威能和邪术师典范之道攻击威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你敏捷调整值的加值。5级时，此加值为2 + 你敏捷调整值；15级时，此加值为4 + 你敏捷调整值；25级时，此加值为6 + 你敏捷调整值。 9级时，你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤的生物也在伤害骰上获得此加值 1级：精类契约之赐 Fey Pact Boon The lords of the Feywild practice magic that bends and twists the planes. In that realm, a step through a dense thicket can cover hundreds of miles as mortals reckon distances. With this boon, you transform into a being of wind and clouds, allowing you to leap through space. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.esB8rpNvfR3PcZhQ]{灵魂步伐 Soul Step}威能 1级：精类契约武器 Fey Pact Weapon The blade of winter's mourning is a gift from the fey lords of winter, ice, and snow. It is made from a strange, blue metal that delivers lethal wounds. Because of its supernatural origin, it is lighter and easier to handle than a mundane weapon. The blade reflects the elegant fighting style of the rakes and bravos who haunt wintry fey citadels. A rapier of living metal, the blade shifts and moves of its own accord to aid you in battle. It twists to parry attacks, and with its ability to hinder your enemy's counterattack, you can dart in, deliver an attack, and move away. 当你获得此武器时，你同时获得在持用该武器时能使用的2个威能，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.HEGTiNbsz3c9JxF1]{冰刺击 Icy Skewer}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.j6aoi1YI5SUke7dB]{穿刺碎片 Piercing Shard}
冬哀之刃 Blade of Winter's Mourning邪术师装备
This rapier seems to quiver and hum with its own power, its steel covered with a patina of frost.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 轻刃
擅长加值： +3
伤害： 1d10
{{冰刺击 Icy Skewer}} {{穿刺碎片 Piercing Shard}} 1级：精类契约武器 Fey Pact Weapon（Dragon #393） You have sought out the lady of the White Well and impressed her enough to earn her favor. She entrusts you with a charge: fight in her name and for her honor. How you acquit yourself in your quests will determine whether you can one day claim the ultimate prize. The sword of the White Well was the noble blade used by the fey knight who fathered the lady. When he learned how he had been used by lolth, the knight hurled the weapon into the well and vowed to never fight again. Thus the weapon symbolizes the tragic circumstances of the lady's birth while also representing the gift of magic she bestows to champions who have the best chance at winning her heart. The weapon possesses perfect balance and adjusts its length and weight to its wielder. While not as accurate as those weapons favored in the eladrin courts, it compensates by delivering devastating wounds wherever it strikes. On gaining the sword, you also learn two spells to unlock its magical power. Moonfire blade transforms the weapon into radiant moonlight to help your strikes slip through armor and other defenses unobstructed. When enemies loom on all sides, you can use well of light to call forth the lady's power in a shining beacon. 增益：你可选择此特性来替换通常的「精类契约武器」特性
白井之剑 Sword of the White Well邪术师装备
The sword's slim, pale blade shines as if bathed in moonlight.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 重刃
擅长加值： +2
伤害： 1d12
{{月火之刃 Moonfire Blade}} {{光之源泉 Well of Light}} 7级：精类契约武器惩戒 Fey Pact Weapon Retribution When an enemy dares attack you, you call on the fury of the winter court, manifesting it within your blade as you punish the offender. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.cndjqZUi2JXYWb8w]{冬之惩戒脱离 Winter's Retributive Escape}威能 7级：精类契约武器惩戒 Fey Pact Weapon Retribution（Dragon #393） The lady intercedes on your behalf when you come into danger and bathes you in her radiance to spare you from harm. 增益：你可选择此特性来替换通常的「精类契约武器惩戒」特性 你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0yEoBfkhwtXzVvCx]{月光脱离 Moonlit Escape}威能 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（精类契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Fey) A humanoid creature with woodlike flesh and bearing a heavy, gnarled club answers your summons to serve as a temporary bodyguard at the behest of your fey allies. The wood woad guardian is slow but tough, its thick hide allowing it to absorb attacks. It is a faithful protector, loyally taking attacks meant for you. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个菘蓝守卫 Wood Woad Guardian {{菘蓝守卫 Wood Woad Guardian}} 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（精类契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Fey)（Dragon #393） During the first years of the lady's exile, several handmaidens stayed with her, offering companionship and sympathy. As these handmaidens died, the lady sustained them in undeath and sometimes sends these servants to aid her champions. The handmaiden appears in soft, white light. She is an achingly beautiful eladrin, yet strange in her bearing and manner. She is armed with a slim, white sword and ready to fight at your side. 增益：你可选择此特性来替换通常的「召唤邪术师盟友」特性 如果你有「白井之剑」，则你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个哀悼侍女 Mourning Handmaiden {{哀悼侍女 Mourning Handmaiden}} 11级：魔剑士行动（精类契约） Hexblade's Action (Fey) 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 As you enter the paragon tier, you are able to better access the magic of the fey through your pact. With practice, you learn to slide into the fey realm and travel a short distance, appearing elsewhere in the blink of an eye. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在此额外动作之前或之后，你能以一个自由动作成为隐形并传送最多等同于你敏捷调整值的格数。你保持隐形直到你下一回合开始 11级：精类契约面貌 Fey Pact Aspect 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Your mastery of fey magic lends arcane credence to your lies and unmatched speed to your feet. 增益：你在唬骗检定上获得+2加值，且在速度上获得+1加值 11级：精类契约诅咒 Fey Pact Curse 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You call on the power of the Feywild, directing the verdant growth inherent in that realm to infest your enemy. Leaves and vines quickly take root in your foe, leaving it open to attack. {{碎甲诅咒 Curse of Shattered Armor}} 12级：精类契约祈祷 Fey Pact Invocation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 With this spell, you appeal to the lords of the Feywild to aid you with good fortune in your battles—a sudden gust of wind knocks aside an arrow certain to hit you, or an enemy stumbles on a tree root before it can bring its axe crashing down upon you. However, the fey lords are fickle creatures. Just as they offer good fortune, their moods can suddenly change and curse you with ill luck. {{精类祈祷 Fey Invocation}} 16级：进阶精类契约之赐 Improved Fey Pact Boon 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Your initial understanding of your fey pact allowed you to move among the fabric of the planes, disappearing in one spot and appearing elsewhere in the blink of an eye. With experience, you now know how to draw more deeply on the Feywild's magic. When you teleport, the magic lingers, cloaking you in invisibility. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.esB8rpNvfR3PcZhQ]{灵魂步伐 Soul Step}时，你对你的敌人处于隐形直到你下一回合结束 20级：精类契约变形 Fey Pact Transformation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You draw the magic of the Feywild into yourself and use it to warp the world around you. By twisting the planes, you can teleport with a single step, while your flickering, misty image makes it difficult for foes to attack you. At your command, this magic swirls around you, wracking your foes' minds and leaving them blind to your presence. {{精类变形 Feywild Transformation}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（精类契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Fey) Drawn from the cold regions of the Feywild, a frostblight treant serves as an implacable guardian. The fey lords of the icy reaches command the treants to stand in long ranks amid the mundane trees of their forest realms, crushing invaders with their gnarled limbs and rooting them in place with blasts of cold and ice. Away from its icy home, a summoned frostblight treant has only a fraction of the power that it normally possesses. It freezes enemies in place with its icy roots, protects you with craggy limbs, and can draw the vitality out of your foes. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个枯霜树人守护者 Frostblight Treant Protector {{枯霜树人守护者 Frostblight Treant Protector}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（精类契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Fey)（Dragon #393） The knight who fell to lolth's treachery so long ago lingers as a watchful and protective spirit over his daughter. Although the knight vowed never to bear arms and don armor after his disgrace, he safeguards his offspring from harm by using the Feywild's magic. The lady's favor rewards you with a fragment of the knight's essence to fight at your side. The doomed knight unleashes all the grief brought on by his fall and withers your enemies' resolve to fight. 增益：你可选择此特性来替换通常的「高阶召唤邪术师盟友」特性 你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个幽灵守护者 Spectral Protector {{幽灵守护者 Spectral Protector}}

Fey Pact (Binder).name: 精类契约 Fey Pact (Binder)
Fey Pact (Binder).description: While many tales of the Feywild make it seem like a whimsical land of enchantment, anyone with planar experience knows that, as with the world of men, there is a dark side to the realm of the fey. Sinister fey creatures, agents of the Unseelie, lurk in the shadows of forests and wait for passing prey. The most powerful of these creatures extend their reach beyond their own realm, tempting and warping the minds of mortals. Fey pact binders are a means by which dark fey extend their grasp outside of the Feywild. Binders who form pacts with these powerful Unseelie wield shadow-tainted arcane magic, reflecting the dark, corrupted natures of the fey creatures they serve. Many binders have learned not just how to coax knowledge out of these dark fey creatures, but how to become one of them; the unwary fey pact binder is often corrupted by the same malevolence that empowers his or her benefactor. Alternatively, your fey pact binder might be a dark fey that has taken on the guise of one of the friendlier races, openly using knowledge of Unseelie power while disguising his or her true nature. Such an elaborate disguise often requires the dark fey to actually transform into one of the mortal races; more than just a disguise, the mortal body is a prison in which the power of the dark fey resides. 1级：精类契约之赐（缚影师） Fey Pact Boon (Binder) Some of the first tricks that a fey pact binder masters include how to cloud sight and how to create distractions out of pure shadow. The nature of the power that a binder draws from fey creatures often necessitates luring enemies in close before landing a final strike; a cautious binder learns techniques to keep these lured enemies from inflicting too much harm. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.KUacIn2tulmr0PbE]{障目之云 Cloud Sight}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.FraT5CbGVIlpvPkB]{迷魂暗影 Fascinating Shadows}威能 1级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power Not all of the dark fey in the Feywild are large, powerful creatures. Among the most dangerous are swarms of tiny sprites that can set upon an unwary traveler, bringing a painful death by a thousand cuts. The binder can summon and command a whirlwind of these vicious sprites and watch as they rend the binder‘s enemies with tiny claws, teeth, and makeshift weapons tipped in painful poisons. {{精灵潜袭 Unseelie Sprites}} 3级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power A binder that draws power from the fey quickly learns how to sow confusion among his or her enemies. With the proper application of shadow magic, the mind of a weak enemy can be bent so that they see friends as enemies and enemies as friends. However, those who have their minds clouded in this way often emerge from their shadowy haze to find that they have attacked their own allies. {{忠诚诱惑 Lure of Loyalty}} 4级：精类契约学识 Fey Pact Lore As a result of an ongoing association with a powerful fey creature, the binder learns to weave permanent wards over his or her own body to fend off attacks. Similarly, the binder's mind is so accustomed to the mind-clouding effects of dark fey magic that it becomes inured to such effects. 增益：你在AC和意志上获得+1加值 7级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power Though many might dismiss tales of men being enchanted by a fey song or by the whispers of a dryad, there is one warning from those tales that all travelers in the Feywild know: never let a creature touch you, for that is the surest way for a capricious fey to make you its slave. The binder masters the magic that makes this possible, and by laying a hand on a foe that gets too close, a warlock can make that enemy into a slave for a short time. {{控制之触 Touch of Command}} 9级：缚影师盟友（精类契约） Binder's Ally (Fey) A powerful Unseelie patron might be convinced to loan a binder one of its retainers. Among the most common servants of the dark fey are creatures known as satyrs of the night. These satyrs were once just like their Feywild brethren—jovial, carefree, and tricksy. But these satyrs were seduced by the shadowy power of the binder's fey patron and were slowly corrupted into twisted, cruel versions of their former selves. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个夜魔 Satyr of the Night {{夜魔 Satyr of the Night}} 11级：缚影师行动（精类契约） Binder's Action (Fey) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Shadow magic infuses the arcane power that fuels your spells, seeping through from your dark patron's own corruption. When you exert yourself, your ability to wield that shadow magic clouds the mind of your enemy. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外攻击时，你以此攻击命中的一个敌人晕眩直到你下一回合结束。 11级：缚影师恩惠（精类契约） Binder's Favor (Fey) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Whenever you draw upon the corrupted magic of your Unseelie patron, shadows now seem to form over the eyes of those whom you strike. 增益：当你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.FraT5CbGVIlpvPkB]{迷魂暗影 Fascinating Shadows}命中一个敌人时，你的盟友对该敌人具有隐蔽直到你下一回合结束 11级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power 缚影大师典范之道特性 In the deepest, blackest hearts of Feywild forests, there grows a plant. This plant exudes a poison that fills the minds of living beings with terror. You have wheedled the knowledge of this plant out of the dark fey, and can create a facsimile of its vines out of pure shadow. {{梦魇毒藤 Nightmare Vines}} 13级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power Those who live in cities in the mortal realm, far from fey crossings or forests with a strong fey presence, rarely believe the stories of strong-willed men lured into danger by a dryad's sweet song. You have drawn the knowledge of such magic out of your fey patron, learning to combine that seductive song with other spells. You lure your enemies close to you, then vanish and flit away, leaving them grouped together and vulnerable to your allies' attacks. {{神行呼叫 Fleeting Call}} 16级：缚影师之赐（精类契约） Binder's Boon (Fey) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Your ability to manipulate the will of your enemies does more than blind them to the threat you pose; it muddles their senses to the point that they have a hard time putting up a defense against your allies. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.KUacIn2tulmr0PbE]{障目之云 Cloud Sight}时，此威能的目标同时提供战斗优势直到你下一回合结束 17级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power As you grow more and more like your fey patron, filled with Unseelie magic and knowledge both dangerous and arcane, you learn to focus your abilities on a single enemy and bend its will to your needs. You make that enemy your faithful servant, ensuring that it turns upon its own allies rather than see you come to harm. {{海妖之歌 Song of the Siren}} 23级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power Those who are foolish enough to approach you quickly find themselves under your thrall. You are now as much of an Unseelie force as your fey patron, and any who get close enough for you to lay a hand on them quickly turn to strike their own allies. {{不甘背叛 Unwilling Betrayal}} 25级：高阶缚影师盟友（精类契约） Greater Binder's Ally (Fey) A status symbol among many eladrin noble houses and a valued servant among all fey creatures, the displacer beast is a dangerous creature that reflects the predatory and deceptive aspects of the Feywild. Your power has grown to the extent that you can reach into the Feywild and summon one of these creatures. Upon its arrival, it obeys your commands, sensing the Unseelie magic you wield. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个位移兽 Displacer Beast {{位移兽 Displacer Beast}} 27级：精类契约遭遇威能 Fey Pact Encounter Power Even the most shadow-tainted of fey creatures retains some of the Feywild's beauty and charm. Your fey patron wants the same adoration and devotion as any other fey lord. But where many members of the Court of Stars offer protection and generosity in return for the supplication of their subjects, your patron sees lesser creatures as worms that should grovel at its feet or be crushed under its boot, should the whim strike. You can tap into this drive and force your enemies to kneel before you as they writhe in the terrible beauty and delicious agony of your presence. This devotion briefly lingers, even after you depart. {{蠕虫之愿 Supplication of the Worms}}

Infernal Pact.name: 炼狱契约 Infernal Pact
Infernal Pact.description:
The ancient empire of Bael Turath forged one of the most well-known pacts with the devils of the Nine Hells. Within the labyrinthine system of codes, laws, and oaths that bind the devils into their rigid order, a number of secret loopholes and gaps exist that allow mortals to exploit the deal made by the tieflings' forefathers. And you are one of the hexblades who has learned to do so. Devils harbor a particular hatred for infernal pact hexblades. The devils prefer worship and subservience, rather than the theft of their power. 1级：炼狱契约奖励 Infernal Pact Reward With the power of the infernal pact, your vitality and endurance help fuel your spells. 增益：你在你的邪术师攻击威能和邪术师典范之道攻击威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值。5级时，此加值为2 + 你体质调整值；15级时，此加值为4 + 你体质调整值；25级时，此加值为6 + 你体质调整值。 9级时，你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤的生物也在伤害骰上获得此加值 1级：炼狱契约之赐 Infernal Pact Boon Most hexblades bid some part of their enemies' souls to their patrons, but you have turned the laws of the hells against their masters. When you slay a foe, you claim its soul energy for yourself. Minor cuts and bruises disappear as you reap the benefits of your treachery. In the back of your mind you can hear the infernal lords cursing you and plotting your demise. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.h8qSGUp6isl7TaRv]{灵魂盛宴 Soul Feast}威能 1级：炼狱契约武器 Infernal Pact Weapon The origin of the blade of annihilation is not entirely known. Some believe that the powerful tiefling warlock who created the first infernal pact created the blade. Others believe that it is the remains of an ancient curse placed upon Asmodeus, lord of the Nine Hells, for his treachery in slaying the god remembered as He Who Was and rising to rule all devilkind. What is known is that although infernal pact hexblades are hated and loathed by devils, those hexblades bearing a blade of annihilation are met with even greater wrath. This might be due to the fact that some believe the blade is crafted from the essence of slain devils, and that their life force is what powers a hexblade's pact. There might be some truth to the thought that the blade is a partially sentient being, for it seems to exult whenever it is used to defeat an enemy. With soul eater, you unlock the weapon's ability to drain a foe's life essence to empower your attacks. Blazing doom of the void stokes the weapon's bloodlust, causing flames to lick along its edge as it slices into your enemy. A hexblade wielding this weapon hears a faint roar in his or her mind with each strike, as if some faint, distant being seeks greater acts of bloodlust. Rumors also abound of hexblades who bore this weapon and fell into the service of evil, rising to become great champions of the hells.
湮灭之刃 Blade of Annihilation邪术师装备
This ebony sword seems to absorb the light around it. Motes of silvery light dance along its blade.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 重刃
擅长加值： +2
伤害： 1d12
{{灵魂捕食者 Soul Eater}} {{虚空燃炎 Blazing Doom of the Void}} 7级：炼狱契约武器惩戒 Infernal Pact Weapon Retribution When an enemy dares attack you, you lash out at it with your pact blade, leaving a wound of fire, which forces your foe away. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.0yTUezWQXwckILMo]{反射地狱打击 Reflexive Hellstrike}威能 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（炼狱契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Infernal) Spined devils are some of the weakest of their kind, making their enforced fealty to you more offensive to them. They serve only out of terror, knowing the price your magic will extract from them for any rebellion, since a devil that fails to honor its summoner's demand is instantly annihilated. A summoned spined devil will shout oaths and threats at you, and this spell usually calls forth the same devil, allowing it to nurse a long-standing grudge. The spined devil lackey's death in the world does not destroy it if it died following your orders; instead, it is released back to the hells. Thus, a summoned devil enthusiastically follows suicidal orders. When summoned into battle, a spined devil lackey rains its deadly quills upon your enemies. If an enemy moves too close to you, a quick mental command to it will make the devil launch a quill attack at your foe. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个刺魔侍从 Spined Devil Lackey {{刺魔侍从 Spined Devil Lackey}} 11级：魔剑士行动（炼狱契约） Hexblade's Action (Infernal) 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 As you enter the paragon tier, you learn to master the infernal energy channeled to you through your pact. Your control is such that you can now direct that energy at an enemy, causing it searing pain. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你回合结束前，下一个你的攻击命中或失手的敌人受到等同于5 + 你体质调整值的火焰伤害 11级：炼狱契约面貌 Infernal Pact Aspect 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Your scaly skin and supernatural presence unsettle other creatures. 增益：你获得10点火焰抗力，且在威吓检定上获得+2加值。21级时，此抗力值为20。如果你已经有了10点或更高的火焰抗力（21级时20点或更高），则你的火焰抗力增加5点 11级：炼狱契约诅咒 Infernal Pact Curse 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 With this spell, you weave hellfire into your enemy's soul. A smoldering flame erupts within its body, exploding out in jets of fire that sear nearby enemies. {{燃魂诅咒 Curse of the Fiery Soul}} 12级：炼狱契约祈祷 Infernal Pact Invocation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 The lords of the Nine Hells have no interest in aiding you. After all, you have used their own rules against them to steal their power. They prefer worship and service, not defiant robbery. When you use this power, the pact you forced upon them requires them to give you aid. However, this assistance comes at a price. {{炼狱祈祷 Infernal Invocation}} 16级：进阶炼狱契约之赐 Improved Infernal Pact Boon 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 As you consign your foes to oblivion, you extract raw arcane power from their passing. You have mastered this power to the point that you can now bring forth that energy in the form of a concussive burst that sweeps away your foes. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.h8qSGUp6isl7TaRv]{灵魂盛宴 Soul Feast}时，你同时可以推离每个邻近你的敌人1格 20级：炼狱契约变形 Infernal Pact Transformation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 This audacious spell steals power from Asmodeus himself, seizing an iota of his raw energy and seeding it within you to fuel a dramatic transformation. Though such a small portion might not seem like much, it is enough to grant you the power to hew through your enemies. Asmodeus's wrath at your theft flows through this spell, turning you into a berserk warrior. {{炼狱变形 Infernal Transformation}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（炼狱契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Infernal) Plucking a pit fiend from the battlefields of the Blood War and forcing it to serve you shows the height of both your power to summon devils and the insult you levy against the lords of the Nine Hells with each spell you cast. Although your magic is strong, it is not strong enough to force complete obedience from a pit fiend. Instead, you compel it to send a shadow of itself to your side, but a shadow that is still a fearsome enemy and a useful ally. It uses its flametouched mace to deliver scorching melee strikes, and its tail sting poisons enemies that linger too close to you. The shadow of the pit fiend summoned in this manner takes note of your appearance, name, goals, and enemies, relaying it back to the original. Thereafter, your name is entered into the annals of the hells as an enemy of every devil. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个深狱炼魔仆人 Pit Fiend Servitor {{深狱炼魔仆人 Pit Fiend Servitor}}

Beguiler Bloodline.name: 欺诈者血统 Beguiler Bloodline
Beguiler Bloodline.description: Whether your curse of vampirism was inflicted by fate or by choice, you have come to wholly accept your power by the beginning of the paragon tier. However, though the common folk would call you a monster if they knew your true nature, you cannot simply forsake the memory of the person you once were. You prefer the company of mortals and the benefits of being a part of society. Through the magic of blood and shadow, your mastery of your appearance and your subtle hunting methods have made you the most attractive of predators. Your enemies believe your lies even as they overlook your strangeness. When you reveal your true nature in all its dark glory, they are unable to look away—much less escape—as they fall to their knees before you. 11级：欺诈者血统特性 Beguiler Bloodline Feature 吸血鬼贵族典范之道特性 Your cunning manner keeps your true nature and identity concealed from others, even as it helps you keep your foes off guard in combat. 增益：你在唬骗检定上获得+2加值。当你尝试对一个与你种族相同的特定个体使用的时，此加值增加为+5。此外，你能以一个次要动作进行一次唬骗检定来佯攻并获得战斗优势。你在对任何给你提供战斗优势的生物的伤害骰上获得+3加值 12级：欺诈者血统辅助威能 Beguiler Bloodline Utility Power 吸血鬼贵族典范之道特性 The beguiling power of your blood can be released to charm your foes even in the heat of combat. As your dread curse draws the attention of your enemies, you and your allies gain the advantage. {{庄严灵气 Aura of Grandeur}} 16级：欺诈者血统特性 Beguiler Bloodline Feature 吸血鬼贵族典范之道特性 In whetting the power of your deadly attraction, you have also learned to shroud that power, escaping notice when it suits you. When you do so, the strength of your mind and spirit can cloak you even against the deadly light of the sun. 增益：你在隐秘检定上获得+2加值。如果你在进行此检定的回合内移动了不超过2格或你不在战斗中，则此加值增加为+4 另外，日光不再对你造成光耀伤害，且当它使你虚弱时，你在对抗此效果的豁免骰上获得等同于你魅力调整值的加值 20级：欺诈者血统每日威能 Beguiler Bloodline Daily Power 吸血鬼贵族典范之道特性 At the height of the paragon tier, you are a foe beyond compare. When you invoke the dark splendor of your hunter's instincts, your prey cannot hope to escape you. {{猎食光辉 Predatory Splendor}}

Necromancy School.name: 死灵学派 Necromancy School
Necromancy School.description: An ancient and reviled art, necromancy focuses on the ties between the body, soul, and animating spirit. Your spells can animate the dead, creating thralls to fight on your behalf; despoil an enemy's flesh with rot; or snuff out life with a whisper. Necromancy is a fearsome and grotesque pursuit, and only those of strong will and unwavering commitment can master its magic. 1级：死灵学徒 Necromancy Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 Death stalks your enemies and grants false life to you. You gain a short-lived resilience when you strike. 增益：当你以一个奥术死灵攻击威能命中至少一个目标时，你获得2点临时生命值 5级：死灵专家 Necromancy Expert 专家级学派法师特性 Extensive study into necromantic lore rewards you with unnatural vitality. You boast strength and endurance odd for someone of such sickly pallor or gaunt frame. 增益：你在运动检定和坚韧检定上获得+2加值 10级：死灵大师 Necromancy Master 大师级学派法师特性 Your concentration on necromantic power increases the potency of your necrotic attacks. They bite deeply, ignoring attempts to blunt them. 增益：你的奥术死灵攻击威能无视暗蚀抗力 11级：死灵行动 Necromancy Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Your focus on necromancy spells lets you loose necrotic energy that unravels your foes' defenses. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，每个邻近你的敌人获得等同于你感知调整值的暗蚀易伤。如果敌人已有暗蚀易伤，则改为它被推离最多等同于你感知调整值的格子 11级：死灵遭遇威能 Necromancy Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Author of many sinister necromantic tomes, Nulathoe had no compunctions against using corpses as undead thralls and then annihilating them in an arcane burst when they fell. {{努拉泽尔之震荡死亡术 Nulathoe's Concussive Demise}} 12级：死灵辅助威能 Necromancy Utility Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 A famed spell noted for preserving the dead from decay, Nulathoe's death ward girds creatures against eternity's cruel caress. {{努拉泽尔之死亡防护术 Nulathoe's Death Ward}} 20级：死灵每日威能 Necromancy Daily Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 With a single command, Nulathoe could draw forth the dead to swell the ranks of his vile army. {{努拉泽尔之不死军队术 Nulathoe's Undead Army}}

Evocation School.name: 塑能学派 Evocation School
Evocation School.description: The evocation school of magic focuses on the most destructive expressions of arcane energy. 1级：塑能学徒 Evocation Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 Any mage can cast evocation spells to wield unmatched power on the battlefield. However, as a specialized apprentice, you learn how to wring all possible destructive power from your attacks. 增益：当你为一个奥术塑能威能掷伤害骰时，若任何骰子的结果为1，则选择其中一个重掷，并使用新结果 5级：塑能专家 Evocation Expert 专家级学派法师特性 The destructive power of your magic imbues you with an intensity that your enemies can sense. At the same time, your focus on the raw power of evocation enhances your stamina, making you tougher than those foes would ever suspect. 增益：你在坚韧检定和威吓检定上获得+2加值 10级：塑能大师 Evocation Master 大师级学派法师特性 Throughout the heroic tier, you have honed and shaped your mastery of evocation magic in battle after battle. Now, the energy imbued within your spells can overcome the defenses of even the most formidable foes. 增益：当你使用一个奥术塑能威能造成一种或多种特定类型的伤害时，你无视一个目标的相应类型的抗力。你不能无视免疫 11级：塑能行动 Evocation Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Your mastery of evocation magic draws on barely controlled reserves of arcane energy. When you push yourself in combat, this energy flares to imbue your evocation spells with even deadlier power. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在此回合内下一个法师塑能威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的威能加值 11级：塑能遭遇威能 Evocation Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 The wizard Kelgore's arcane knowledge was matched only by his unbounded rages. This spell is said to be the product of one such fit (prompted by a troublesome fey intent on teleporting away with Kelgore's spellbooks). Like magic missile, this spell hits with perfect accuracy, and it is favored by those who know they won't have the chance for a second shot. {{凯尔格之绝对火焰术 Kelgore's Undeniable Fire}} 12级：塑能辅助威能 Evocation Utility Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Kelgore was a frail, scrawny specimen, making his fi ts of anger all the more comical. Disdainful of physical strength, he created this spell to trade vitality for pure arcane might. {{凯尔格之力量源泉术 Kelgore's Well of Power}} 20级：塑能每日威能 Evocation Daily Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 When Kelgore's wrath reached its peak, it touched off a rage that endured even after his most powerful spells were exhausted. In the aftermath, the foul-tempered wizard developed this spell, determined to unleash destruction that would last as long as his fury. {{凯尔格之火雨术 Kelgore's Rain of Fire}}

Virtue of Sacrifice.name: 牺牲美德 Virtue of Sacrifice
Virtue of Sacrifice.description: A cavalier of sacrifice must be ready to give up anything—money, status, power, or life itself—to defend those too weak to shield themselves from evil. Cavaliers of sacrifice are renowned because of the hardships they endure for the good of others. You sleep in a stable while your allies rest in an inn, to save a few coins for the poor. You wear little more than simple, peasant's garb when not in armor and are an ascetic devoted to your cause, willing to endure any ill or pain to prevent others from suffering it. Even though the virtue of sacrifice carries a heavy cost, you must temper your actions with humility. You give up so much, but that sacrifice does not make you more noble than others. Pride is your enemy, because it threatens to lead you to arrogance and ultimately disdain for those you protect. Cavaliers of sacrifice who fall to evil become even more villainous due to the great distance they tumble. 阵营：必须守序善良。牺牲美德对其信徒要求很多。只有最高尚的圣骑兵才会信奉它。 1级：牺牲精神 Spirit of Sacrifice When you draw on your inner reserves, you can call upon the divine power of your virtue to instead grant that strength to an injured ally. 增益：你获得一个额外回复力。此外，你能以一个次要动作使用你的回气来医疗离你5格内的你选择的一个盟友。如果你这么做，那么你不会因使用回气而获得收益，但是该盟友恢复等同于他回复力值的生命值。 1级：美德随意威能 Virtue At-Will Power In the hands of a cavalier of sacrifice, a weapon is more than a tool of destruction. It is a symbol of hope, because each strike you make against hope’s enemies shows your allies the path to victory. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.zEPD3phF8Rxe592I]{希望打击 Strike of Hope}威能 7级：进阶正义之盾 Improved Righteous Shield The stronger you become in your conviction, the easier it becomes to protect your allies, which only further strengthens your conviction. 增益：当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JZf7qkNMosBTRCUS]{正义之盾 Righteous Shield}时，你受到的伤害减少10点。23级时，你受到的伤害减少20点。 11级：牺牲行动 Sacrificial Action 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 When you reach for your deepest reserves of strength and will to push beyond normal limits, the power of your virtue flows freely through you. At those times, you can expend some of your vitality to let that power flow over your nearby allies, healing their wounds. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你能以一个自由动作同时花费一个回复力。这么做你不会恢复生命值，但离你5格内的每个盟友恢复等同于你的等级的生命值 11级：牺牲信标 Beacon of Sacrifice 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 While the virtue of sacrifice requires you to focus on aiding those weaker than you, this power allows you to harm your enemies while following your virtue. You create a focused burst of radiant energy that sears your foes. As part of the power, you can also sacrifice some of your life energy to protect your allies. {{牺牲信标 Beacon of Sacrifice}} 12级：牺牲旗帜 Banner of Sacrifice 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 The banner of sacrifice is a sign of hope in the chaotic battlefield that draws your allies to it. As you stand and fight, the divine magic of this power transforms the pain of your wounds into soothing, healing magic for your allies. {{牺牲旗帜 Banner of Sacrifice}} 20级：牺牲责任 Burden of Sacrifice 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 Pride and arrogance are both potential pitfalls for cavaliers of sacrifice, because this virtue carries a great demand that only a few can shoulder. You demonstrate the high price expected of you by giving your own vitality to restore the health of your allies. {{牺牲责任 Burden of Sacrifice}} 22级：共享牺牲 Shared Sacrifice The virtue of sacrifice, when shared among your allies, allows you to ensure that each of your foes' attacks harms only the strongest among you. You call upon divine favor, and a golden aura surrounds you, creating a shared pool of strength and vitality that your comrades can draw upon. {{共享牺牲 Shared Sacrifice}}

Star Pact.name: 星辰契约 Star Pact
Star Pact.description:
The strange entities that associated with the stars have many names, but oddly, these names seem a constant across all languages and cultures that know them. Star hexblades learn the names in fevered dreams and waking delusions, and among them are the following: Hadar, Acamar, Gibbeth, Nihal, and Ulban. Each is associated with a particular light in the night sky, or in the position where a star should be. The powers and personalities associated with the stars differ according to the warlock who interacts with them, and their influence is often so subtle as to make star pact hexblades who detect it doubt their own thoughts and senses. 1级：星辰契约奖励 Star Pact Reward As a star pact hexblade, you use your intellect and knowledge of the arcane to weave strength into your attacks, adding power to both your magical and physical attacks. 增益：你在你的邪术师威能和邪术师典范之道威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你智力调整值的加值。5级时，此加值为2 + 你智力调整值；15级时，此加值为4 + 你智力调整值；25级时，此加值为6 + 你智力调整值。 9级时，你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤的生物也在伤害骰上获得此加值 1级：星辰契约之赐 Star Pact Boon They say a creature's fate is written in the stars, yet only star pact hexblades can fully comprehend how true that aphorism is. Doom begets doom, and death spirals inevitably toward more death. With the influence of Acamar, the Hungry Star, you use the death of one foe to tug at the web of fate and draw another enemy closer to the end. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Tt3N6MsqxpvmXZEI]{不祥之兆 Dire Fate}威能 1级：星辰契约武器 Star Pact Weapon The secrets of the starshadow blade always find their way into the possession of a star pact hexblade through seeming coincidence and accidents of misfortune. When you call your pact weapon, it takes the form of a longsword formed of ghostly light and darkness. At times it glimmers with a baleful paleness and at others it appears surrounded by slithering tendrils of shadow visible only from the corner of the eye. The entities you contact through the star pact exist as beings of unknowable minds associated with both the brilliance of stars and the cold silence of the dark between them. occupying a unique place both within and outside the cosmos, they sit astride the skeins of fate. Resplendent blade and wield the warp reveal these connections by giving you the power to create starbursts with sword strokes and to alter existence by shifting all in the universe but you and your foe.
星影之刃 Starshadow Blade邪术师装备
This longsword of shifting light and shadow appears as if someone made it by folding molten dreams and nightmares in the forge of a star.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 重刃
擅长加值： +3
伤害： 1d10
{{光辉之刃 Resplendent Blade}} {{挥舞扭曲 Wield the Warp}} 7级：星辰契约武器惩戒 Star Pact Weapon Retribution Star pact hexblades know Ihbar not by its light, but by its darkness. A blot of black in the sky that has slowly expanded over the centuries, Ihbar swallows traveling stars, cloaking their light as they enter it. Ihbar seems reluctant to release the wandering celestial bodies that enter it, because they take longer to cross Ihbar's darkness than other sectors of the sky. Star pact hexblades use the gaze into nothing power to grant foes a glimpse into Ihbar's darkness. For some the blindness provokes terror. A rare few have even gone mad. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.y74ie6zBP8H1mwJh]{凝视虚无 Gaze into Nothing}威能 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（星辰契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Star) A presence enters the world in response to your call. A crack in the air opens to reveal a sucking void, and the struggling mass of an unseen thing emerges before the crack closes with a sound like skin tearing. You have summoned a thought phantom, one of the lesser spawn of the star entities. The thought phantom is slow but it stalks foes invisibly and seeks to crush their thoughts. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个沉思幽灵 Thought Phantom {{沉思幽灵 Thought Phantom}} 11级：魔剑士行动（星辰契约） Hexblade's Action (Star) 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 With intense focus upon your arcane connection to the stars, you open a conduit to the thoughts of the star entities and foist their attentions upon your foe. By shielding your brain to even a glimpse of their intense minds, you save yourself from their staggering power. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，在你回合结束前，下一个你的攻击命中或失手的敌人晕眩直到你下一回合结束 11级：星辰契约面貌 Star Pact Aspect 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Your intense meditation on the beings that lurk beyond space and that link the planes gives you astonishing insight into the magic that flows through everything and steels your mind against the horrors of the knowledge you unearth. 增益：你在神秘检定上获得+2加值，且获得10点心灵抗力。20级时，此抗力值为20。如果你已经有了10点或更高（20级时，20点或更高）的心灵抗力，则你的心灵抗力增加5点 11级：星辰契约诅咒 Star Pact Curse 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You've come to learn things forgotten by primordials and kept secret by gods. Your connection with the beings that provide that knowledge grants you protection against the dangers of knowing things that the universe wishes to remain unknown, but your enemies aren't so lucky. You open a foe to the insights of Khirad, the piercing blue star of insight and horror. {{禁断知识诅咒 Curse of Forbidden Knowledge}} 12级：星辰契约祈祷 Star Pact Invocation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You open your mind and body to the stars and become them. Your body transforms into radiance and void, and as you gain the perspective of the distant stars, you feel yourself becoming more detached from the reality you know. The star entities show little interest in the affairs of mortals, but as you siphon their power to do your will, you can't help but feel that something is watching—and drawing closer. {{星辰祈祷 Star Invocation}} 16级：进阶星辰契约之赐 Improved Star Pact Boon 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Your promise to the star entities offered them more than you realized, but it granted more power than you thought as well. Now that you understand what you have lost, you believe you would have made the same bargain, but perhaps your thoughts to the contrary were also bargained away. The death of a foe not only causes a hole in fate but an imbalance in space as well, allowing you to manage the motion of enemies like the Behemoth Star, Acamar, shifts the stars around it. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.Tt3N6MsqxpvmXZEI]{不祥之兆 Dire Fate}时，你可以选择离你2格内的一个敌人且滑动此敌人1格 20级：星辰契约变形 Star Pact Transformation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Calling upon the star entities to fulfill their enigmatic promise to you, you erupt into an ecstasy of light. Floating high above the battlefield, your radiance shines brighter than the sun. Allies can hardly bear to look upon your majesty, and enemies can be struck blind when they dare to face you. {{星辰变形 Starry Transformation}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（星辰契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Star) A moment after your call, the soundless and weightless immensity of the way walker simply appears. Air feels drawn into the starry void that forms its roughly humanoid body. Around it sounds seem muted. light dims. This being from the outer darkness serves the star entities, acting toward their unknowable ends in the voids between worlds and planes. Unused to existence in mortal space, the way walker is only half real. It passes through objects like a ghost, and it can grant you and your allies the power to walk with it in the spaces between existence and nothingness. Enemies who feel its touch aren't so lucky; their minds become open to the incredible disinterest the way walker feels toward all reality, and, for a moment, they lose the will to act or to live. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个道路行者 Way Walker {{道路行者 Way Walker}}

Star Pact (Binder).name: 星辰契约 Star Pact (Binder)
Star Pact (Binder).description: The night sky of the mortal realm is an unfathomable deep filled with uncountable stars. In the dark between those stars lies the Far Realm, where dread creatures creep just beyond the reach of mortal senses and sanity. Older than all other parts of creation, these entities can be observed only as celestial patterns and signs. A binder of the star pact learns to manipulate those fell patterns, and to channel power no mortal creature was meant to know. Star pact warlocks depend on Intelligence to master the dangerous knowledge they pursue. Any warlock can choose to take powers of the star pact that have levels, but binders have a special affinity for the madness and magic it represents. A binder gains additional benefit from some star pact powers, as noted in the power's description. 1级：星辰契约之赐（缚影师） Star Pact Boon (Binder) Your connection to the mysterious Far Realm allows you to thwart the sight and senses of your enemies. You shroud a foe’s mind with a glimpse of the darkness beyond the stars. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.1uQUaJ8MESLZkniw]{藏身学识 Hidden Lore}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.CVlIXbLr4vkcy9ai]{精神暗影 Mind Shadows}威能 1级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power The power of the Far Realm lets you shape shadow in the likeness of the creatures that writhe beyond the void. {{暗影触手 Shadow Tentacles}} 3级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power By opening a small rent in the boundary between this world and the lightless void, you allow the horror of that darkness to wash across your enemies. {{虚空冲击 Void Blast}} 4级：星辰契约学识 Star Pact Lore Touched by knowledge that is not meant to be tasted by mortals, your mind opens to the power of the Far Realm. 增益：你获得5点心灵抗力，且在神秘检定和宗教检定上获得+2加值 7级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power The eternal darkness that spreads between the stars is charged with deadly cold. By manipulating your power to form a black cyst of this nothingness, you freeze your foe from the inside out. {{黑暗囊肿 Cyst of Darkness}} 9级：缚影师盟友（星辰契约） Binder's Ally (Star) The soul eater is a strange creature spawned between the stars. It appears as an inky cloud of darkness from which emerge two gnarled claws. Feeding on the death energy of other creatures, the soul eater channels that energy to you in the heat of combat. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.TaAX5DSWdKuiH2MC]{噬魂者 Soul Eater} {{噬魂者 Soul Eater}} 11级：缚影师行动（星辰契约） Binder's Action (Star) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Your mastery over the forces that dwell in the void makes your spontaneous attacks more potent. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你在造成寒冰，暗蚀，或心灵伤害的伤害骰上获得+4加值。此加值持续到你此回合结束。 11级：缚影师恩惠（星辰契约） Binder's Favor (Star) 缚影大师典范之道特性 You can cast your foe's mind into a darkness that renders it more vulnerable to the realities of the physical world. 增益：当你以你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.CVlIXbLr4vkcy9ai]{精神暗影 Mind Shadows}命中时，所有对此威能的目标具有战斗优势的攻击都在伤害骰上获得+2威能加值，直到你下一回合结束 11级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power 缚影大师典范之道特性 As you enter the paragon tier, you gain a deeper understanding of the terrors that lurk within the void. This dreaded spell casts a foe into the darkness for a brief second to overwhelm its body and mind. {{黑暗放逐 Banish to Darkness}} 13级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power The dark energy of the void has a hunger for all living things. When you summon that void to the battlefield, any creature that lingers too close pays the price. {{暗黑吞噬 Devouring Dark}} 16级：缚影师之赐（星辰契约） Binder's Boon (Star) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Your alliance with the entities beyond the stars allows you to fade from reality, slipping toward nonexistence when you vanish from your foes' sight. 增益：当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.1uQUaJ8MESLZkniw]{藏身学识 Hidden Lore}时，你可以同时成为虚体直到你下一回合结束 17级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power You have spent your life strengthening your mind against the horrors of the Far Realm. Those who lack your discipline and training do not fare as well as you when the void presses in. {{高级虚空爆发 Greater Void Burst}} 23级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power This deadly spell can cripple even the strongest foe with searing pain, for no creature can withstand the power of the void for long. {{内在虚空 Inner Void}} 25级：高阶缚影师盟友（星辰契约） Greater Binder's Ally (Star) A doom hulk is a humanoid brute sculpted from the darkness between the stars, then bound by magic and granted limited sentience. It crushes its foes with its powerful fists, while those who remain too close to it quickly feel their life force drawn away. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个厄运巨物 Doom Hulk {{厄运巨物 Doom Hulk}} 27级：星辰契约遭遇威能 Star Pact Encounter Power At the height of your pact’s power, you call forth the lifeless maw of the void. This dark energy tears at all creatures with the hunger of the faceless horrors that dwell within it. {{饥渴虚空 Hungry Void}}

Gloom Pact.name: 阴暗契约 Gloom Pact
Gloom Pact.description:
You have made a bargain with the darkness, drawing on the power of the unseen masters of the Shadowfell and making that power your own. When you forged this pact, you sacrificed a portion of your own soul to whet your patron's appetite. From that point forward, each enemy that falls before you is drawn into the embrace of the dark power you serve. The gloom pact grants you access to shadow power, which you weave into your arcane spells. Charisma is important to you, because your pact features and powers depend on it. Dexterity should be your second-highest score. 1级：阴暗契约奖励 Gloom Pact Reward The darkness to which you pay homage grants you a surge of supernatural power that you can channel into your magical attacks. 增益：你在你的邪术师攻击威能和邪术师典范之道攻击威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你敏捷调整值的加值。5级时，此加值为2 + 你敏捷调整值；15级时，此加值为4 + 你敏捷调整值；25级时，此加值为6 + 你敏捷调整值。 9级时，你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤的生物也在伤害骰上获得此加值 1级：阴暗契约之赐 Gloom Pact Boon The spirits of those you slay congregate around you, warped by shadow energy into wretched shells that are hungry for the life denied them. When you harvest an enemy's life force, you let it carry it into the shadow for a time. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.zjtdSUClWqJxPRfN]{暗影集结 Convocation of Shadows}威能 1级：阴暗契约武器 Gloom Pact Weapon The scourge of exquisite agony is the vile weapon of a torturer, and it can channel the shadow power of your pact against those who refuse to yield to you. An iron handle wrapped in stained leather, the scourge is set with nine steel chains each ending in a barbed hook. These tails move of their own volition, writhing in their eagerness to taste the flesh of your foes. 当你获得此武器时，你同时获得在持用该武器时能使用的2个威能，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.zbKruSxTW32Pl5tO]{皮开肉绽 Flesh Rend}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.lcpIZnV9gfA7G8KY]{精神剥离 Spirit Flay}
剧痛之鞭 Scourge of Exquisite Agony邪术师装备
The horrid tails hanging from this blackened flail writhe like steel serpents, their bite capable of rending armor, flesh, and bone.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 连枷
擅长加值： +2
伤害： 1d10
武器特性： 触及
{{皮开肉绽 Flesh Rend}} {{精神剥离 Spirit Flay}} 7级：阴暗契约武器惩戒 Gloom Pact Weapon Retribution Any enemy that dares to strike at you discovers that you are never defenseless when armed with your deadly scourge. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.mBtwHD4MEKXOVfRg]{暗影鞭笞 Shadow Scourge}威能 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（阴暗契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Gloom) The mysterious dark ones are a furtive, murderous lot, wicked and unnerving in their zeal for murder. As your servant, a dark creeper eagerly answers your call for the chance to target distracted enemies, slinking across the battlefield to help conceal you from your foes and plant its blade in an enemy's back. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个黑暗爬行者 Dark Creeper {{黑暗爬行者 Dark Creeper}} 11级：魔剑士行动（阴暗契约） Hexblade's Action (Gloom) 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 The dark power behind your pact lends you the strength you need to push beyond your normal limits. By drinking deep of the power of shadow, you become something like a shadow yourself. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你成为虚体直到你下一回合结束 11级：阴暗契约面貌 Gloom Pact Aspect 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 As the energy of the Shadowfell flows through you, the dark power of that realm grants you a measure of protection. 增益：你获得10点暗蚀抗力，且在隐秘检定上获得+2加值。如果你已经有了10点或更高的暗蚀抗力，则你的暗蚀抗力增加5点 11级：阴暗契约诅咒 Gloom Pact Curse 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You maintain your pact through the destruction you wreak in battle. To aid in this harvest of souls, you master a dreadful spell that denies your enemy the ability to flee or fight back. {{衰老诅咒 Curse of Age}} 12级：阴暗契约祈祷 Gloom Pact Invocation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You call on the power of shadow, but no one ever truly controls that power. The gloom that swirls around you can hide you from view. However, this same darkness can steal away your strength to leave you vulnerable to attack. {{黑暗祈祷 Dark Invocation}} 16级：进阶阴暗契约之赐 Improved Gloom Pact Boon 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 The spirit energy of your fallen enemies is twisted and corrupted by your increased dark power. When the time is right, you channel the rage of all those foes into a concerted attack. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.zjtdSUClWqJxPRfN]{暗影集结 Convocation of Shadows}时，在你下一回合结束前，你同时对你下一次攻击的单一目标获得战斗优势 20级：阴暗契约变形 Gloom Pact Transformation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 By releasing the shadow that clouds your soul, you invest your physical form with dread magic. You become a creature of pure darkness—a malevolent wraith whose touch saps your enemies' strength and whose form is nearly impervious to attack. {{暗影变形 Shadow Transformation}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（阴暗契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Gloom) The sorrowsworn owe allegiance to no master except perhaps the Raven Queen. Chasing after the misery and suffering on which they feast, these creatures act as dark emissaries of the Shadowfell, exacting vengeance on mortals that have circumvented the natural order, or battling the sinister forces at large in their native plane. Though you lack the power to truly master the sorrowsworn, you can draw on your gloom pact to give you temporary command of such a creature, which aids you until dismissed or destroyed to be re-formed in the darkness. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个哀誓魔 Sorrowsworn {{哀誓魔 Sorrowsworn}}

Gloom Pact (Binder).name: 阴暗契约 Gloom Pact (Binder)
Gloom Pact (Binder).description: The gloom pact of the warlock draws on the power of creatures that dwell forever in gloom and shadow. Such arcane entities can be found in vast numbers in the Shadowfell. The masters of the gloom pact remain effectively unknown, even to those who serve them. However, many binders who forge this pact believe that they channel the power of the dark lords trapped in the Shadowfell. Locked in their prisons, these dark lords are beyond concern for how their power is used—making them perfect partners for the arcane might a binder seeks. A good Dexterity score benefits a gloom pact warlock, since a subtle touch is necessary to properly command the power of void and shadow. Any warlock can choose to take powers of the gloom pact that have levels, but the magic of the binder is specifically suited to the pact. A binder gains additional benefit from certain gloom pact powers, as noted in the power's description. 1级：阴暗契约之赐（缚影师） Gloom Pact Boon (Binder) You have an aptitude for the shaping of shadow. The darkness that eddies around you on the battlefield responds to your command, carrying allies and enemies like dead leaves on the wind. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.sezr7YA0Z312GVgb]{回响挽歌 Echoing Dirge}和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.nieF94tjpS8U2Ngw]{暗影扭曲 Shadow Warp}威能 1级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power Legends tell of a shadowy beast that dwells in the mist that borders and encases the domains of dread. The magic of the gloom pact gives this hound form and substance at your command, driving your foes from you in terror. {{暗兆猎犬 Hound of Dark Omen}} 3级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power You call on the power of shadow to extend your reach across the battlefield, crafting a swarm of clawed hands that surround and tear into your foe. {{乌木之爪 Ebon Claws}} 4级：阴暗契约学识 Gloom Pact Lore The secrets of shadow open your eyes and protect your body against the power of death. 增益：你获得黑暗视觉和5点暗蚀抗力。如果你已经有5点或更高的暗蚀抗力，则此抗力增加5点 7级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power The dark energy of the Shadowfell spreads easily from a point of darkness you create. As your foe is stricken by the power of your spell, your other enemies are quickly drawn to share its suffering. {{黑暗棺罩 Pall of Darkness}} 9级：缚影师盟友（阴暗契约） Binder's Ally (Gloom) A shadow lurk is a creature born of a sliver of gloom and given the barest level of sentience. It flutters like a ghost, shrouding you as it lashes out through armor, flesh, and bone to claw at the spirit and soul within its target. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个暗影潜伏者 Shadow Lurk {{暗影潜伏者 Shadow Lurk}} 11级：缚影师行动（阴暗契约） Binder's Action (Gloom) 缚影大师典范之道特性 Your eyes become orbs of absolute darkness, allowing you to see the life energy flowing within your foes. With this sight, you can focus your attacks to increase your enemies' vulnerability. 增益：当你花费一个行动点来使用攻击威能时，你对此攻击的每个目标获得战斗优势 11级：缚影师恩惠（阴暗契约） Binder's Favor (Gloom) 缚影大师典范之道特性 With a gesture, you can use the fleeting energy of echoing dirge to affect another enemy. 增益：当你以你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.sezr7YA0Z312GVgb]{回响挽歌 Echoing Dirge}命中时，此冲击范围内一个额外的生物受到等同于你敏捷调整值的心灵伤害 11级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power 缚影大师典范之道特性 By leaching the light from the battlefield, you create an impenetrable cloud of darkness within which whispering shades and lurking shadows feast upon your foes. {{暗夜潮汐 Tide of Night}} 13级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power You turn a bit of coalesced shadow into a dread spectral beast that chills your foes to the bone. {{缠身暗影 Haunting Shadow}} 16级：缚影师之赐（阴暗契约） Binder's Boon (Gloom) 缚影大师典范之道特性 The shadows that dance around you in combat can render those who ride them capable of moving through solid objects. 增益：当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.nieF94tjpS8U2Ngw]{暗影扭曲 Shadow Warp}时，你可以滑动目标穿过敌人的空间和障碍地形。目标必须停在一个它可以正常占据的空间 17级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power Many spells of shadow focus on animating and controlling a single shadow, but devouring tide takes the opposite approach. Uncountable shards of shadowstuff are spawned at your command, each possessing the hunger of the void. {{吞噬潮汐 Devouring Tide}} 23级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power Light and shadow destroy each other where they touch. By imbuing the power of darkness and radiance into your foe, you let the energy of that destruction consume it from the inside out. {{暗耀光辉 Umbral Radiance}} 25级：高阶缚影师盟友（阴暗契约） Greater Binder's Ally (Gloom) A gloom beast resembles an enormous hunting cat whose yellow eyes glare out from swirling, smoky darkness. Like a displacer beast, it has two whiplike tentacles emerging from its back, which attack with stinging cold that spreads numbness throughout the body. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个阴暗凶兽 Gloom Beast {{阴暗凶兽 Gloom Beast}} 27级：阴暗契约遭遇威能 Gloom Pact Encounter Power As your command of shadow magic reaches its heights, you create a portal into a distant region of the Shadowfell. Lashing out at an enemy, you banish it from the battle for a key moment, even as its shadowy afterimage flails in rage and pain. {{幽暗置换 Umbral Swap}}

Virtue of Valor.name: 英勇美德 Virtue of Valor
Virtue of Valor.description: On the battlefield, you are the pinnacle of bravery. You stand resolute against any foe, from a seemingly endless wave of kobolds to a mountain-shaking titan. Without valor, the other virtues lose meaning and impact. To stand against a daunting foe or to hold tight to the exacting standards of the order of cavaliers— both of these tasks require faultless valor. You stand at the forefront of a battle, taking the vanguard position to both strike at your foes and shield your allies from your enemies' most ferocious attacks. In this manner, your adherence to valor ensures that your bravery serves as a stirring example. Valor must be tempered with wisdom. The valorous cavalier does not fight for the sake of fighting, but for the just cause. Valor turns to bloodlust when a cavalier fails to see that skill at arms is only one solution. Tales abound of valorous cavaliers who have fallen to evil. They didn't abandon their virtue, but rather lost the wisdom needed to wield it for good. 阵营：守序善良，善良或无阵营。虽然英勇的理想要求勇敢作战，但是它要求其信徒不攻击弱者和无辜 1级：英勇精神 Spirit of Valor As an adherent of valor, you are always ready to take up the cause of justice in battle. Your blade flies from its sheath at the first sign of combat, while your superior endurance allows you to remain in the fight long after others have faltered. 增益：你在先攻检定上获得+4威能加值，且你的回复力值增加2点 1级：美德随意威能 Virtue At-Will Power You call upon the power of your virtue to hold your enemy accountable for the injuries it seeks to inflict on your allies. Your weapon shines with radiant energy, which flashes as you strike. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.YFimPtNORC7ET064]{报复打击 Vengeful Strike}威能 7级：进阶正义之盾 Improved Righteous Shield When you see your allies attacked, you let the divine energy of your virtue course through you so that you can deliver vengeance upon your foes once you have protected your allies from harm. 增益：当你使用你的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.JZf7qkNMosBTRCUS]{正义之盾 Righteous Shield}时，在你下一回合结束前，你同时在下一次伤害骰上获得等同于2 + 你魅力调整值的加值。23级时，此加值等同于5 + 你魅力调整值 11级：勇武行动 Valorous Action 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 You live to avenge the innocent. You accept that villains and monsters will rain blows upon you, but their attacks against your allies only heighten your wrath. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你同时在攻击骰上获得+2威能加值直到你下一回合结束。如果当你花费行动点时离你5格内有至少1个重伤盟友，则此加值为+4 11级：英勇信标 Beacon of Valor 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 As you embody the power of your virtue, you inspire your allies to fight harder. At the same time, your valorous display terrifies your foes. Frozen in place with panic, they cannot flee the coming storm of your allies' attacks. {{英勇信标 Beacon of Valor}} 12级：英勇旗帜 Banner of Valor 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 Many battles have turned at the foot of this banner, because warriors who might otherwise have fled the battle find the willpower to carry on. Those who stand and fight under the banner's divine glow gain renewed strength and purpose. {{英勇旗帜 Banner of Valor}} 20级：英勇责任 Burden of Valor 英勇圣骑兵典范之道特性 Drawing on the power of your virtue, you force an opponent to fight you. Your divine magic stirs its bravery, causing it to focus its attacks on no one but you. {{英勇责任 Burden of Valor}} 22级：共享英勇 Shared Valor As battle erupts, you draw on the might of your convictions, filling yourself and your allies with courage. You then all magically leap forward to face your foes. {{共享英勇 Shared Valor}}

Nethermancy School.name: 幽影学派 Nethermancy School
Nethermancy School.description: Originating from the work of renegade wizards who were exiled to the Shadowfell, nethermancy spells extract shadow magic from the environment and blend it with arcane energy. They can create impenetrable darkness, spark terror in your enemies, and form horrific monsters from shadowstuff. 1级：幽影学徒 Nethermancy Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 Darkness serves at your command. Your spells fog your enemies' senses with shadow. 增益：被你的奥术幽影攻击威能命中的生物，视离它超过2格远的敌人为拥有隐蔽直到你下一回合结束 5级：幽影专家 Nethermancy Expert 专家级学派法师特性 Shadows crawl and writhe around you, forming a shifting tapestry of grotesque shapes. These shadows mask your presence and give you an edge when facing down a foe. 增益：你在威吓检定和隐秘检定上获得+2加值 10级：幽影大师 Nethermancy Master 大师级学派法师特性 Darkness sustains you, granting your spells greater potency when you are in shadows. 增益：当你对一个生物有任何隐蔽时，你对它获得战斗优势 11级：幽影行动 Nethermancy Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Your aspect changes to something monstrous, a transformation made possible through your extensive familiarity with nethermancy's secrets. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你的空间和每个邻近你的格子形成一个黑暗区域，此区域持续到你下一回合开始。此区域对除你以外的生物是完全障目 11级：幽影遭遇威能 Nethermancy Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 The archmage Evard mastered the Shadowfell's secrets, drawing forth its rich magic and bending it to his will. His preoccupation with such dark pursuits affected him profoundly, as is evident from the spells he left for those who would follow his path. {{埃瓦德之扭曲黑暗术 Evard's Wrenching Darkness}} 12级：幽影辅助威能 Nethermancy Utility Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Evard had few friends, largely because he regarded others as inferior. Evard's all-seeing worm is but one example of how he exploited his companions. {{埃瓦德之全视蠕虫 Evard's All-Seeing Worm}} 20级：幽影每日威能 Nethermancy Daily Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Evard is best known for drawing twisted monsters infused with dark energy from the Shadowfell. Spells such as Evard's black tentacles and Evard's dreadful mist suggest what the dark wizard was after. Evard's black gate comes nearest to realizing the secrets that Evard sought, for it creates a portal to the Shadowdark's depths, where aberrant mutants mingle with shadowborn abominations. Those who pass through the gate rarely emerge intact or sane. {{埃瓦德之黑暗大门 Evard's Black Gate}}

Elemental Pact.name: 元素契约 Elemental Pact
Elemental Pact.description:
Your pact is an unusual one, since you might have made it with unwilling or unaware primordial partners. Inviting elemental power into your soul affects a subtle transformation that gives you access to elemental magic's raw, destructive potential. You venture into the wider world as a champion of destruction, a force for upheaval, armed with the power of chaos. 1级：元素契约奖励 Elemental Pact Reward Your primordial connections keep you supplied with elemental power that you can release through your magical attacks. 增益：你获得鳞甲擅长。另外，你在你的邪术师攻击威能和邪术师典范之道攻击威能的伤害骰上获得等同于你体质调整值的加值。5级时，此加值为2 + 你体质调整值；15级时，此加值为4 + 你体质调整值；25级时，此加值为6 + 你体质调整值。 9级时，你以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤的生物也在伤害骰上获得此加值 1级：元素契约之赐 Elemental Pact Boon Souls wriggling free from those slain on the battlefield excite the chaos flowing from your pact. Elemental energy rushes out and protects you from harm. The fading life force enables you to become a creature of chaos, if only for a few moments. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.VNMzvPqAalcbkRE7]{混沌守护 Warding Chaos}威能 1级：元素契约武器 Elemental Pact Weapon The original blade of chaos was forged from a broken piece of panoply belonging to Miska the Wolf-Spider that was lost when the fabled Wind Dukes of Aqaa defeated him. A fouled bit of steel, nearly overlooked as mere debris, it contained a fragment of the primordial's essence. Other blades of this sort have been crafted over the years, each one channeling raw, chaotic force and enabling the wielder to turn it to advantage. A curved chopping sword with a single serrated edge, a blade of chaos is a physical manifestation of a warlock's elemental pact. Although it appears heavy and unwieldy, the blade is easily wielded in one hand. One can feel elemental power roiling in the steel, as if the weapon were alive. The blade's bearer can call forth its wrath with two powers born in chaos. Unraveling strike breaks down a creature's natural resistances to elemental magic, and elemental wrath releases a flood of destructive energy in whatever form the wielder chooses, to blast a foe and destroy anyone else who comes too close.
混沌之刃 Blade of Chaos邪术师装备
This large, curved blade has a single serrated edge.
武器分类： 单手军用近战武器
武器组： 重刃
擅长加值： +3
伤害： 2d4
武器特性： 高重击
{{拆解打击 Unraveling Strike}} {{元素怒火 Elemental Wrath}} 7级：元素契约武器惩戒 Elemental Pact Weapon Retribution Enemies realize their error in attacking you when you instantly blast their thoughts with a psychic scream fueled by the chaos residing in your serrated blade. 增益：你获得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.samblCB8jWSYJzD3]{元素咆哮 Elemental Roar}威能 9级：召唤邪术师盟友（元素契约） Summon Warlock's Ally (Elemental) The archons first appeared during the Dawn War as an answer to the angelic legions making up the gods' armies. Forged in vast numbers from elemental materials, the archons had keen intellects and an abiding hatred for their immortal foes. You can call upon an archon to aid you in battle. Although the archon has little reason to aid you, the blade you bear bends it to your will, and thus the archon fights at your side. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个亚空士兵。当你使用此威能时，掷一个d4来决定你召唤的亚空士兵类型：1，气系；2，土系；3，火系；4，水系 {{气系亚空士兵 Air Archon Grunt}} {{土系亚空士兵 Earth Archon Grunt}} {{火系亚空士兵 Fire Archon Grunt}} {{水系亚空士兵 Water Archon Grunt}} 11级：魔剑士行动（元素契约） Hexblade's Action (Elemental) 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 You can draw more sustenance from your pact when you need to push past your normal limits. When you do so, elemental essence alters your form to make it more resilient and flexible. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，你获得等同于你一半等级的临时生命值。直到你下一回合结束，你的近战武器攻击触及范围增加1 11级：元素契约面貌 Elemental Pact Aspect 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Magic that originates in the Elemental Chaos can protect you from the plane's destructive energy and help you withstand the rigors of hostile environments. 增益：你在坚韧检定上获得+2加值。在每次长休息结束时，选择强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电或雷鸣。你获得对此选择的伤害类型的10点抗力，直到你下一次长休息结束。21级时，此抗力值为15。 11级：元素契约诅咒 Elemental Pact Curse 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Although your primordial benefactors might not always be aware of your service, to ensure a steady supply of magical energy you must reinforce your pact with souls harvested from the enemies you defeat. The chaotic mind curse spell unhinges an enemy's mind to make the creature into an unwitting accomplice in creating carnage. {{混乱精神诅咒 Chaotic Mind Curse}} 12级：元素契约祈祷 Elemental Pact Invocation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Chaos surges into you when you call on your distant source for assistance. Unpredictable and potentially dangerous, the primordials' boon might either protect you from magical attacks or subject to you even greater injury. {{元素祈祷 Elemental Invocation}} 16级：进阶元素契约之赐 Improved Elemental Pact Boon 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 Each enemy slain feeds power to the primordials. In exchange, they take notice of you and reward your efforts with a surge of elemental energy. 增益：当你使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.VNMzvPqAalcbkRE7]{混沌守护 Warding Chaos}时，在你下一回合结束前，你下一次近战武器攻击造成等同于你体质调整值的额外伤害。当你进行此攻击时，选择强酸，寒冰，火焰，闪电或雷鸣作为此额外伤害的类型。 20级：元素契约变形 Elemental Pact Transformation 传说魔剑士典范之道特性 The chaos flowing into you triggers a drastic transformation. You become an elemental monstrosity, a living storm of destructive energy that shifts and changes with each attack you make. Your form protects you from those same chaotic forces. {{元素变形 Elemental Transformation}} 25级：高阶召唤邪术师盟友（元素契约） Greater Summon Warlock's Ally (Elemental) The primordials' firstborn, the titans witnessed and aided in the world's creation. Each titan is a vast being armed with elemental power reflecting its maker's nature and temperament. Hate drives these creatures, and they rule as petty tyrants over domains populated by giants and lesser creatures. Not even you, with all your magical power, can compel these creatures to serve you, so when you summon a titan, you are calling forth a mere fragment of its essence in whatever elemental substance is at hand. 增益：你能使用@UUID[Compendium.dnd-4e-compendium.module-powers.K2syXQZgD3OoJ6I1]{召唤邪术师盟友 Summon Warlock's Ally}召唤一个泰坦战士。当你使用此威能时，掷一个d4来决定你召唤的泰坦战士类型：1，风暴；2，土系；3，火系；4，寒霜 {{风暴泰坦战士 Storm Titan Warrior}} {{土系泰坦战士 Earth Titan Warrior}} {{火系泰坦战士 Fire Titan Warrior}} {{寒霜泰坦战士 Frost Titan Warrior}}

Pyromancy School.name: 占火学派 Pyromancy School
Pyromancy School.description: 1级：占火学徒 Pyromancy Apprentice 学徒级学派法师特性 Fire roars through your soul just as it courses through your magic. The fire you tap in to burns hotter than any source found in the world or even on the planes. 增益：你在奥术火焰攻击的伤害骰上获得+1加值。11级时此加值为+2，21级时次加值为+3。另外，你的攻击无视火焰抗力 5级：占火专家 Pyromancy Expert 专家级学派法师特性 Shadows crawl and writhe around you, forming a shifting tapestry of grotesque shapes. These shadows mask your presence and give you an edge when facing down a foe. 增益：你在唬骗检定和威吓检定上获得+2加值 10级：占火大师 Pyromancy Master 大师级学派法师特性 Your spells ignite the ground, spreading flames and consuming your enemies even if they are fortunate enough to dodge your attacks. 增益：当你使用不创造区域的区域或近程奥术火焰攻击威能时，此攻击的范围成为一个区域，此区域持续到你下一回合结束。在此区域内结束其回合的生物受到等同于你体质调整值的火焰伤害 11级：占火行动 Pyromancy Action 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Your first steps along the path of pyromancy mastery required you to relinquish some control. In doing so, you learned the secrets of fire magic. Now, when you draw upon your reserves of energy and effort, you exercise precise, deadly control of your magic. 增益：当你花费一个行动点进行额外动作时，选择一个离你10格内的敌人。本回合内下一次你以随意或遭遇火焰攻击对此敌人造成伤害时，此敌人受到如同你在所有的伤害骰子上掷出最大值的伤害。如果你造成重击，则此额外伤害也取最大值。如果你造成的伤害不需要伤害骰，则你不获得此收益 11级：占火遭遇威能 Pyromancy Encounter Power 高深学派法师典范之道特性 Kelwyn's devouring fire has a sinister reputation.
